ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language the film is in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the film (e.g., PG, PG-13, R) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Distributor of the film */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the film */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the film's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the film's poster image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "twitter_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Twitter followers */,
  "instagram_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Instagram followers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "twitter_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Twitter followers */,
  "instagram_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Instagram followers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_cast" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the actor plays in the film */,
  "character_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the character */,
  "character_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "gross" REAL /* Total gross revenue of the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Production budget of the film */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Domestic gross revenue */,
  "international_gross" REAL /* International gross revenue */,
  "opening_weekend_gross" REAL /* Gross revenue during the opening weekend */,
  "number_of_theaters" INTEGER /* Number of theaters the film was released in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "num_critic_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of critic reviews for the film */,
  "num_user_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews for the film */,
  "imdb_score" REAL /* IMDB score for the film */,
  "critic_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by critics */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by users */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_social_media" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Total Facebook likes for the film */,
  "twitter_likes" INTEGER /* Total Twitter likes for the film */,
  "instagram_likes" INTEGER /* Total Instagram likes for the film */,
  "youtube_views" INTEGER /* Total YouTube views for the film */,
  "tiktok_views" INTEGER /* Total TikTok views for the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_metrics" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "num_voted_users" INTEGER /* Number of users who voted for the film */,
  "cast_total_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Total Facebook likes for the cast of the film */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the audience */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the audience by gender */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the audience by income */,
  "education_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the audience by education level */,
  "location_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the audience by location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Content rating (e.g., PG, PG-13, R) */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Description of the content rating */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)
column_names: Duration of the film in minutes
